name: Brain MRI Epilepsy Protocol
description: Brain MRI epilepsy protocol with thin-section coronal T2, FLAIR, and dedicated hippocampal imaging

findings.technique: MRI brain with epilepsy protocol including thin-section coronal T2, FLAIR, and 3D T1 sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Hippocampi
sections.content: Right hippocampus: [normal size / normal signal / no atrophy / no sclerosis]. Left hippocampus: [normal size / normal signal / no atrophy / no sclerosis].

sections.name: Temporal Lobes
sections.content: Temporal lobes show [normal morphology / no cortical dysplasia / no heterotopia / no mass].

sections.name: Mesial Temporal Structures
sections.content: Amygdalae are [symmetric / normal / no abnormal signal]. No mesial temporal sclerosis.

sections.name: Extra-Temporal
sections.content: No extra-temporal cortical malformations. No abnormal signal in other brain regions.

impression:
1. No evidence of hippocampal sclerosis.
2. No cortical dysplasia or developmental lesion identified.
3. Normal epilepsy protocol study.
